title: moderation.appeal_submitted / moderation.appeal_decided event payload (v1)
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 20.9. Produced by epd2_moderation_service.events.appeal_state_payload, shared verbatim by build_appeal_submitted_event (moderation.appeal_submitted) and build_appeal_decided_event (moderation.appeal_decided) - verified by reading events.py, both call the identical payload function. Deliberately excludes submitted_by/grounds (see appeal_full_state_payload for Audit Core's complete snapshot). reviewer_actor_id/result are nullable (null until decide_appeal sets them).
